item.title: FINALE
item.itunes:title: FINALE
item.description:
16/12/22: And that's us team... Today is our last ever show as Sharyn and Jayden. It has been such an amazing run over the past three years but Jayden is off on his big OE and Sharyn is holding down the fort on the new afternoons lineup! Thank you all so much for listening and we love you all to bits. Enjoy xx

PODCAST PLAYLIST:

  • JAYDENS LOST IN HAMILTON RECAP
  • BEAT OFF
  • JAYDEN'S LAST JOKE OF THE DAY
  • DRAX PROJECT JOIN US IN STUDIO!
  • THE ANIMAL LIFE EXPECTANCY GAME
  • LINDA JOINS US ONE LAST TIME
  • FACT, FACT, LIE
  • THE END

FIND US ON INSTAGRAM, Cause we are thirsty:

Sharyn and Jayden - @SharynandJayden

Sharyn @SharynCasey

Jayden @JaydenCreechKing

Dan @DanWebby

Soph @Sophienathan


Happy Listening, we appreciate you and don’t forget to give us a cheeky rating xx

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: JAYDENS GETS A SPANKING
item.itunes:title: JAYDENS GETS A SPANKING
item.description:
12/12/22: Wilhelmina Shrimpton joins us in studio to chat about her new doco High and Die - The Fentanyl Problem, and Jayden tells us what his drunk party habit is. Enjoy xx

PODCAST PLAYLIST:

  • TINDER HACKS
  • JAYDEN'S JOKE OF THE DAY
  • WILHELMINA SHRIMPTON JOINS US IN STUDIO!
  • SHOULD YOU HAVE TO PAY UTILITIES WHEN YOU'RE NOT IN THE FLAT?
  • WHAT IS YOUR DRUNK PARTY THING?
  • FACT, FACT, LIE

TODAYS LINKS:

CHECK OUT The Core: High and Die - The Fentanyl Problem HERE:

https://www.todayfm.co.nz/home/national/2022/12/the-core-high-and-die-the-fentanyl-problem.html

Sharyn and Jayden - @SharynandJayden

Sharyn @SharynCasey

Jayden @JaydenCreechKing

Dan @DanWebby


Happy Listening, we appreciate you and don’t forget to give us a cheeky rating xx

item.title: Bonus Book Club Podcast - Abbas Nazari FULL CHAT
item.itunes:title: Bonus Book Club Podcast - Abbas Nazari FULL CHAT
item.description:
Today we were joined by the author of the incredible book 'After The Tampa'. Abbas Nazari is one heck of a human who has been through more than most people can ever imagine! Abbas and his whanau left Afghanistan when he was 8 and tells of one of the most incredible journeys to freedom.
For more info about the book, click HERE.
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.content:encoded:
Today we were joined by the author of the incredible book 'After The Tampa'. Abbas Nazari is one heck of a human who has been through more than most people can ever imagine! Abbas and his whanau left Afghanistan when he was 8 and tells of one of the most incredible journeys to freedom. 

For more info about the book, click HERE.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

If you like what you hear, you can listen more to the Trainee Sexologist here! Listen on rova Listen on Spotify Listen on Apple

The Trainee Sexologist Season 2 Episode 2: The Secret Sex World Happening Right In Front of You
We chat with a Sex Party Organiser to find out exactly how freaky things get, listen out for the bit where Shaz gets told off! We ask Miss C all the questions you've ever wanted to know about her job as a sex worker. Introduction The ins and outs of Sex Parties Survey Results! Interview with Miss C Outro
Links from the show: Sex Workers of Aotearoa Exhibition - https://www.swoa.co.nz/swoa-2021-join-us Find us on Instagram - @TraineeSexologist Morgan's website - www.morganpenn.co.nz Caci Clinic - www.caci.co.nz

The New Zealand Music Power Hour SPECIAL! We've banded together with some of the biggest names in NZ Music to raise awareness for Music Helps Live, a campaign to support the live music industry in NZ! Text MUSIC to 2448 to donate $3
Lorde - 2:05 Mitch James - 7:20 Benee - 12:05 Drax Project - 16:11 Robinson - 20:36 Matiu (Six60) - 24:45 Joel (L.A.B.) - 28:55

item.description: On today's show we're still on the hunt for New Zealand's Greatest Story and we've collected some incredible ones from Christchurch, and one of the team forgot to pack something for the road and now they're totally gross - find out who!

item.description: On today's show we're on the road in Tauranga collecting New Zealand's Greatest Stories and there sure are some doozies out there - bluetooth stitch ups, accidental nudity and the MOST ROMANTIC story of all time.
